race.comment: TRAPEAZY (11) worked home evenly without ever raising backers' hopes when resuming over 1100m at Scone last time out. Gets all the favours today from the inside gate. Lines up for only the third time so there is plenty of scope for improvement. ALBERT'S PICK (2) showed pace but weakened in the run home over this trip at Quirindi on Monday. Must be respected with the stable opting to back up quickly. TIGER TIERS (10) earns a pass mark for her return over 1000m at this track recently. Should be more effective over an extra 200m. NOT MEE (4) dropped out after leading for home here at this trip last start. Fitter and might offer a bit more this time. Very hard to make a case for the remaining runners.
